arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s Felix Nmecha to miss several weeks with a ligament injury
arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten reports that Borussia Dortmund midfielder Felix Nmecha will miss several weeks with a ligament injury picked up at the weekend. Nmecha went off in the first half in Dortmund’s…

arts.ttl: Sven Mislintat set to be sacked by Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten reports that Borussia Dortmund are set to fire Sven Mislintat due to the unrest he has caused in the team’s management since his return. Since returning to the club…
After recently sacking Nuri Sahin as head coach, Borussia Dortmund have now also decided to part company with coach Sven Mislintat, according to Ruhr Nachrichten.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Shakhtar Donetsk - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Champions League clash between Borussia Dortmund and Shakhtar Donetsk, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund hold talks with Niko Kovac
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s search for a successor to Nuri Sahin continues. Ruhr Nachrichten report that BVB officials flew to Salzburg on Monday to undergo talks with Niko Kovac in order to…
